name: api_luma_uni_1_image_create
description: Luma UNI-1 image generation via the LumaImageNode2 partner node — Luma's reasoning-and-generation image model. Single text prompt drives composition; aspect ratio is parameterizable via the top-level aspect_ratio argument (defaults to 'auto' baked into the workflow, letting the model pick). Workflow ships with model.style='auto' and model.web_search=true; edit the JSON if you want to change those. Runs via a Comfy Cloud API node (requires a configured COMFY_CLOUD_API_KEY).

prompt.description: Text description of the image to generate.
